dialogue2.phrase: I hope he knows how to center a div. Few survive that.

dialogue3.phrase: On the Secondary Screen, you can view your entire team of developers.

dialogue4.phrase: There you can keep track of your professionals, analyze attributes, and get to know your team better.

dialogue5.phrase: Plus a bit of each one's story. I hope they're nicer than feijoada mixed with yogurt.

dialogue6.phrase: And so begins your great journey at RetroCODE!

dialogue7.phrase: No pressure… the future of world systems depends on you.

dialogue8.phrase: And I'll stay here to help you.
